query: SELECT je.id, je.entryDate, je.description, je.totalAmount, je.qboSynced, je.qboJeId, l.name FROM journalEntries je LEFT JOIN locations l ON je.locationId = l.id WHERE je.entryType = 'revenue' AND je.entryDate BETWEEN '2026-03-10' AND '2026-03-16' ORDER BY je.entryDate, je.locationId;
